languages.text: "Боюсь, я разочарую вас не меньше Себериана, инквизитор, ибо и мне не в чем перед вами каяться".

traits.locale_text: "Боюсь, я разочарую вас не меньше Себериана, инквизитор, ибо и мне не в чем перед вами каяться".

languages.text: "I fear I shall be no less of a disappointment than Seberian, Inquisitor, for I too have nothing to repent of before you."
languages.original_text: "Боюсь, я разочарую вас не меньше Себериана, инквизитор, ибо и мне не в чем перед вами каяться".

traits.locale_text: "I fear I shall be no less of a disappointment than Seberian, Inquisitor, for I too have nothing to repent of before you."
"I fear I shall be no less of a disappointment than Seberian, Inquisitor, for I too have nothing to repent of before you."
"I fear I shall be no less of a disappointment than Seberian, Inquisitor, for I too have nothing to repent of before you."

languages.text: “审判官大人，恐怕我也会像塞贝里安一样让你失望，因为在你面前，我同样没有什么可忏悔的。”
languages.original_text: "I fear I shall be no less of a disappointment than Seberian, Inquisitor, for I too have nothing to repent of before you."

traits.locale_text: “审判官大人，恐怕我也会像塞贝里安一样让你失望，因为在你面前，我同样没有什么可忏悔的。”

languages.text: « J'ai bien peur de vous décevoir tout autant que Seberian, inquisiteur, car moi non plus, je n'ai rien à confesser devant vous. »
languages.original_text: "I fear I shall be no less of a disappointment than Seberian, Inquisitor, for I too have nothing to repent of before you."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai bien peur de vous décevoir tout autant que Seberian, inquisiteur, car moi non plus, je n'ai rien à confesser devant vous. »

languages.text: "Korkarım Seberian gibi ben de hayal kırıklığına sebep olacağım Engizisyoncu. Zira benim de karşında tövbe edecek hiçbir şeyim yok."
languages.original_text: "I fear I shall be no less of a disappointment than Seberian, Inquisitor, for I too have nothing to repent of before you."

traits.locale_text: "Korkarım Seberian gibi ben de hayal kırıklığına sebep olacağım Engizisyoncu. Zira benim de karşında tövbe edecek hiçbir şeyim yok."

languages.text: «Me temo que seré tan decepcionante como Seberian, Inquisidor, pues yo tampoco tengo nada de lo que arrepentirme ante usted».
languages.original_text: "I fear I shall be no less of a disappointment than Seberian, Inquisitor, for I too have nothing to repent of before you."

traits.locale_text: «Me temo que seré tan decepcionante como Seberian, Inquisidor, pues yo tampoco tengo nada de lo que arrepentirme ante usted».

languages.text: "Ich fürchte, ich werde nicht weniger enttäuschend sein als Seberian, Inquisitor, denn auch ich habe vor Euch nichts zu bereuen."
languages.original_text: "I fear I shall be no less of a disappointment than Seberian, Inquisitor, for I too have nothing to repent of before you."

traits.locale_text: "Ich fürchte, ich werde nicht weniger enttäuschend sein als Seberian, Inquisitor, denn auch ich habe vor Euch nichts zu bereuen."

languages.text: 「私はシベリア、インキジターほどではないかもしれませんが、あなたの前で悔い改めるべきことは何もありません」
languages.original_text: "I fear I shall be no less of a disappointment than Seberian, Inquisitor, for I too have nothing to repent of before you."

traits.locale_text: 「私はシベリア、インキジターほどではないかもしれませんが、あなたの前で悔い改めるべきことは何もありません」
